processEndpoints.name: completeQuotation
preconditions: Quotation must have at least one line
Quotation status must be DR (Draft) or IP (In Progress)
All quotation lines must have a product assigned
All quotation lines must have a positive quantity
validUntil date must be in the future

processEndpoints.name: convertToOrder
preconditions: Quotation must not have been already converted
validUntil date must not have passed

processEndpoints.name: voidQuotation
preconditions: Quotation must not have been converted to an order

queryParams.filtering: Use field name as query param: ?fieldName=value
